info.title: Voa - Travel Management API
info.description: REST API for corporate travel request management. Authentication via JWT Bearer token.

get.summary: List activity logs (requesters see own logs only; managers and admins see all)

post.summary: Authenticate user and return JWT token
Send a password reset link to the user's email
Reset the user's password using a token

get.summary: Get dashboard statistics for the authenticated user
Get the oldest travel request pending approval
Get the most recent travel requests for the authenticated user
Retrieve a valid (non-accepted, non-expired) invitation by token

404.description: Invitation not found, already accepted or expired

post.summary: Accept an invitation and create the user account

422.description: Invitation not found or validation error

post.summary: Send an invitation email to a new user (admin only)

422.description: Validation error or email already in use

get.summary: Return the list of popular/cached destinations (public endpoint)
List the last 50 notifications for the authenticated user

patch.summary: Mark all unread notifications as read
Mark a single notification as read

get.summary: List travel requests with optional filters and pagination
Get a single travel request by ID

put.summary: Update a travel request (only when status is 'requested')

422.description: Already cancelled, expired or not cancellable

patch.summary: Approve or cancel a travel request (manager or admin only)

403.description: Forbidden or cannot change own request status

get.summary: List all users with optional filters and pagination (admin only)
Return a minimal list of users (id, name, email) for dropdowns
Get a user by ID (own profile or approver access)

put.summary: Update a user's name or role (admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a user (admin only, cannot delete self)

patch.summary: Activate or deactivate a user (admin only, cannot toggle self)

get.summary: Return the number of pending travel requests for a user (admin only)
